events.title: Post-Babel Migration
events.description: Descendants of Cush settle the Upper Nile and Horn of Africa.

events.title: Rise of Kerma
events.description: First major urban center in Nubia, a powerful trading rival to Egypt.

events.title: D'mt Culture Flourishes
events.description: Pre-Aksumite culture in Tigray/Eritrea showing strong South Arabian (Sabaean) influence.

events.title: Napatan Kush and 25th Dynasty
events.description: Nubian kings conquer Egypt; Tirhakah rules and challenges Assyria.

events.title: Shift to Meroe
events.description: Following an Egyptian raid, the Cushite capital moves south to Meroe.

events.title: War with Rome
events.description: Kandake Amanirenas leads Meroitic forces against Roman invasion, securing a peace treaty at Samos.

events.title: Conversion of the Ethiopian Eunuch
events.description: A court official of the Meroitic Candace is baptized by Philip.

events.title: Aksum Conquers Meroe
events.description: King Ezana of Aksum destroys Meroe and converts to Christianity, reordering regional power.
